summary: Iteration 17 - Unfair Advantage Layer testing complete. Dashboard loads within 10s (voice briefing fix confirmed). Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 8 Unfair Advantage pages tested successfully with full functionality.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads within 10s - no stuck 'Initializing JARVIS Intelligence Core...' state
GET /api/advantage/trader-dna (auth) - returns DNA profile (The Operator, 80% win rate)
GET /api/advantage/trader-dna (no auth) - returns 401 unauthorized
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace - returns 5 strategies with performance data
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace?asset_class=stocks - filter works
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace?asset_class=crypto - filter works
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace?asset_class=forex - filter works
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace?sort_by=subscribers - sort by Popular works
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace?sort_by=rating - sort by Top Rated works
GET /api/advantage/strategies/marketplace?sort_by=performance - sort by Best Return works
POST /api/advantage/strategies/{id}/subscribe (auth) - subscribes to strategy
POST /api/advantage/strategies/{id}/subscribe (no auth) - returns 401
POST /api/advantage/strategies/invalid_id/subscribe - returns 404
GET /api/advantage/global-intelligence - returns crowd positioning, smart money, sentiment shifts
GET /api/advantage/opportunity-scanner - returns 9 active opportunities with filters
GET /api/advantage/top-traders - returns 8 traders with scores and verified badges
POST /api/advantage/jarvis-challenge (auth) - returns AI devil's advocate analysis with verdict (WAIT)
POST /api/godmode/simulate - returns Monte Carlo simulation with edge score (56), scenarios
GET /api/godmode/performance - returns 120 signals, 51.7% win rate, strategy breakdown
Frontend: Trader DNA page shows profile type, risk tolerance, asset preferences, recommendations
Frontend: Strategy Marketplace shows 5 strategies with filters (All/Stocks/Crypto/Forex) and sort buttons
Frontend: Subscribe button works - toast notification and My Strategies tab shows subscribed strategy
Frontend: Global Intelligence shows crowd positioning bars, smart money signals, sentiment shifts
Frontend: Opportunity Scanner shows 9 opportunities with confidence scores and type filters
Frontend: Social Proof shows top 3 podium, full rankings with verified badges
Frontend: JARVIS Challenge accepts asset/direction/reasoning and returns AI analysis with verdict
Frontend: Trade Simulator runs simulation and shows verdict (NEUTRAL), edge score, risk metrics, scenarios
Frontend: Performance page shows KPI cards, strategy breakdown, recent signals, monthly chart, verified badge
Sidebar: Unfair Advantage section has all 6 links (Trader DNA, Marketplace, Global Intel, Opp Scanner, Top Traders, JARVIS Challenge)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard loading fix confirmed - voice briefing moved to user-triggered 'Daily Intelligence' button
Trader DNA requires 3+ trades to unlock profile - shows 'insufficient_data' state for new users
Strategy Marketplace seeds 5 sample strategies when DB is empty - AI Quant Blend, BTC Scalper Pro, etc.
Global Intelligence generates realistic crowd positioning even without real user data
Opportunity Scanner randomly generates opportunities for demo - production would use real market data
Top Traders shows sample data when no real users have scores
JARVIS Challenge uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key - response time 5-15 seconds
Trade Simulator runs 1000 Monte Carlo simulations client-side for instant results
seed_data_creation: User has 5 trades for Trader DNA profile, subscribed to 'AI Quant Blend' strategy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested Unfair Advantage Layer - 7 new features with 8 frontend pages. All endpoints under /api/advantage/* working: trader-dna (behavioral profile), strategies/marketplace (5 strategies with filters/sort), strategies/{id}/subscribe (auth required), global-intelligence (crowd positioning + smart money), opportunity-scanner (9 live opportunities), top-traders (leaderboard), jarvis-challenge (GPT-5.2 devil's advocate). Also tested /api/godmode/simulate (Monte Carlo) and /api/godmode/performance (verified track record). Dashboard fix confirmed - voice briefing is now user-triggered via 'Daily Intelligence' button. Test user (test@test.com/test) has Trader DNA profile 'The Operator' with 80% win rate, subscribed to 'AI Quant Blend' strategy.

mocked_components.note: Some data is SEEDED when database is empty
seeded_data: Strategy Marketplace - 5 sample strategies by 'Aureos AI Lab'
Global Intelligence - crowd positioning generated when no user trades exist
Opportunity Scanner - opportunities randomly generated for demo
Top Traders - sample traders shown when no real score data exists
Performance Track Record - 120 historical signals seeded for demonstration
real_integrations: JARVIS Challenge: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (real AI analysis)
Trader DNA: Real analysis of user's paper trade history from MongoDB
Strategy Subscribe: Real subscription stored in MongoDB

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Dashboard loading fix confirmed working. All Unfair Advantage features functioning correctly.
